creator: toxic@doobie.com
text:
The maintainer (me) is on vacation, and unavailable for the next week or so. 

if a committer vouches for the fact that this builds and doesnt cause problems and updates the port to the new upstream location and version, then I guess I support and approve it... but I can't personally look at this until at least the 25th, when I'm back in town.

The patch looks fine and very simple, and traditionally, this has been a pretty straightforward piece of software.  I'm inclined to say "commit it", but without building it myself, I'm a little reluctant.

Use your best judgement, or wait until the end of the month when I can get a chance to put eyes on it.

-Toxic
